platform.title: Secure Data Platform
platform.subtitle: Secure data exchange system for religious confessions of the Republic of Uzbekistan

login.title: Sign in
login.message: Enter your credentials to access your account
login.twofa_message: Enter the code from your authenticator app

errors.account_locked: Account is locked. Try again later

twofa.show_qr: Show QR code for Google Authenticator

keysetup.title: E2E Encryption Setup
keysetup.description: To protect your confessions, we need to generate a unique encryption key pair. Your private key is stored encrypted with a password in your browser.
keysetup.password_reminder: Remember this password — you'll need it to unlock confessions on new devices.

errors.min_length: Password must be at least 12 characters long.
errors.uppercase: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter.
errors.lowercase: Password must contain at least 1 lowercase letter.
errors.number: Password must contain at least 1 number.
errors.special_char: Password must contain at least 1 special character (!@#$%^&*).

password_reset.title: Reset password
password_reset.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
password_reset.success_message: If an account with this email exists, we've sent a password reset link.

password_confirm.title: Set new password
password_confirm.success_message: Your password has been changed successfully.

session_limit.select_description: There is an active session on another device. To continue, select it and request a termination code.
session_limit.verify_description: A 6-digit verification code has been sent to your email. Enter the code.
